summary: Created #140 and bootstrapped agent task state on docs/code-directory-readmes-gh-140.
Added scripts/check_code_readmes.py plus unit tests to define tracked code-directory README coverage.
Added Makefile and CI integration for the new coverage check.
Added lightweight README.md files for all missing inferred code directories; coverage now reports 44 directories OK.
files: code-directory README.md files under .agents/ .claude/ .cursor/ scripts/ tasks/

validation.command: conda run -n llm python -m py_compile scripts/check_code_readmes.py scripts/check_code_readmes_test.py

next_action.instruction: 提交 README 覆盖实现，push 分支并创建关联 #140 的 draft PR。
acceptance: 实现提交包含 README 覆盖脚本、CI/Makefile 集成、代码目录 README 与 checkpoint 更新。
分支 push 到 origin，并创建关联 #140 的 draft PR。
